account-overview-swarm.summary: Build a decision-ready account brief with verified facts, strategic context, stakeholder coverage, risks, and next actions.

closing-pipeline-swarm.summary: Pressure-test late-stage close plans, commercial blockers, and forecast realism when commit judgment matters.

customer-success-swarm.summary: Plan onboarding, adoption, renewal readiness, expansion support, and reference creation for early customers.

deal-next-steps-swarm.summary: Recommend the next best moves on an in-flight deal before it becomes a close or forecast review.

discovery-demo-swarm.summary: Prepare discovery and demo calls with tighter research, questions, objections, and follow-up.

icp-prospecting-swarm.summary: Define the ideal customer profile, rank buying signals, and map likely entry points for outreach.

inbound-qualification-swarm.summary: Triage inbound demand, judge fit and urgency, and route the next step with more discipline.

multi-stakeholder-outreach-swarm.summary: Coordinate outreach across a buying committee with role-specific messaging, sequencing, and review boundaries.

outbound-appointment-setting-swarm.summary: Plan outbound that books first meetings with stronger hooks, sharper CTAs, and cleaner sequencing.

pipeline-generation-swarm.summary: Build a fresh ranked target-account plan for net-new pipeline using fit, timing, stakeholders, and outreach hypotheses.

sales-materials-swarm.summary: Turn the core sales narrative into practical decks, outreach assets, demo structure, proof packaging, and reusable collateral.

sales-narrative-swarm.summary: Build a sales narrative with buyer pain, value framing, proof, objections, and next actions.

signal-monitoring-to-action-swarm.summary: Triage ongoing market and account signals into a ranked action queue for accounts or segments you already care about.
